description_long: This bungalow features a compact, single-story structure with a blue gabled roof made of overlapping shingles. The front facade includes a small wooden porch with railings and steps leading up to a central double-door entrance, flanked by two symmetrically placed windows with frosted glass. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving the building a natural, rustic appearance. The side and rear walls are plain, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing the focus on the front entry. The bungalow sits on a square patch of green grass, suggesting a yard or garden setting. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for residential neighborhoods or small urban lots.
description: A small, single-story wooden bungalow with a blue gabled roof, front porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue gabled roof, central double doors, two front windows, and a wooden porch with steps and railings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wooden wall and the depth of the blue shingled roof, with the porch and railings extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a featureless wooden wall and the full width of the blue roof, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the plain wooden wall and the porch structure extending from the front.
